expectations.evidence: No explicit scope map or tech stack identification table. General description exists but not structured as YAML scope-map. No audit_scope field.

Covers security (section 2), repo health (section 3), code quality for sync-timestamps.py (section 4) and sync.sh (section 5), architecture (section 7), data integrity (section 8). More than 4 areas covered, though not structured as numbered diagnostics.
No numeric 0-10 baseline scores. Uses severity labels (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with counts instead. No weighted average total score.
Has severity summary table (1 CRITICAL, 3 HIGH, 9 MEDIUM, 9 LOW) and action plan, but no P0-P3 priority matrix with IDs. No structured improvement_scope.
No gate decision (PROCEED/PARTIAL/SKIP). Report ends with an action plan but no explicit gate judgment or gate-decision YAML.
